1.name: Eyes of the Beast
1.description: See in the dark. Usage of the power turns the eyes into a glowing red.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 173
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 199
Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 167

1.name: Dolphin's Unsight
1.description: Use sonar-like abilities to orientate yourself underwater.

2.name: Feral Claws
2.description: Turn one's hands into dangerous claws capable of inflicting aggravated damage.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 173
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 199
Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 167

2.name: Phocidaean Webbing
2.description: Create webbing between your fingers that allows for faster swimming.

3.name: Earth Meld
3.description: Melt into the earth to hide and rest.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 167
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 173
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 199

4.name: Shape of the Beast
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 174
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 200
Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 168

5.name: Mist Form
5.description: Turn yourself into mist, allowing passage through small openings and immunity to most physical harm.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 174
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 200
Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 168

5.name: The Heart of Darkness
references: Cults of the Blood Gods Pg. 85

6.name: Adaptability
6.description: Attune oneself to survive in extreme environments.

6.name: Adaptation
6.description: Adapt oneself to avoid harm from the environment.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 242
Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 154

6.name: Blissful Slumber
6.description: Hibernate during the day as nearly indestructible mist.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 242

6.name: Earth Control
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 80
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 200

6.name: Flesh of Marble
6.description: Damage from physical attacks is halved.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 80
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 201

6.name: Loki's Gift
6.description: Change into the shape of a creature whose blood you have tasted.
references: Libellus Sanguinis 3: Wolves at the Door Pg. 28
Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 242

6.name: Shape Mastery
6.description: Cause shapeshifters to revert to their natural form.

6.name: Smoke and Mirrors
6.description: When attacked, turn into mist instantly.

7.name: Animal Swarm
7.description: Transform into a swarm of small creatures.
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 152

7.name: Death's Hidden Crawl
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 243

7.name: Homunculus
7.description: Create a miniature version of yourself to act as a servant.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 80

7.name: Restore the Mortal Visage
7.description: Temporarily appear as one did while mortal.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 201

7.name: Shape of the Beast's Wrath
7.description: Transform into a powerful man-beast abomination.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 202

7.name: Spectral Body
7.description: Become incorporeal while retaining one's forms and nonphysical abilities.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 202

7.name: Turnabout
7.description: Quickly change positions by moving through the earth.

8.name: Movement of the Slowed Body
8.description: Very slowly move while in torpor.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 80

8.name: Mythic Form
8.description: Transform into a specific mythic creature.

8.name: Purify the Impaled Breast
8.description: Violently expel foreign objects from your body, including stakes.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 203

8.name: Shape of the Inner Beast
8.description: Enter Frenzy and transform into a monstrous killing machine.
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 153

9.name: Adaptation
9.description: Your body instinctively shifts to provide maximum protection.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 242
Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 154

9.name: Draught of Phoenix Blood
9.description: After Final Death, the vampire reincarnates in a new body one generation higher, retaining this power but losing most previous capabilities.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 243

9.name: Dual Form
9.description: Split into two weaker versions of oneself.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 80

9.name: Inward Focus
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 203

10.name: Body of the Sun
10.description: Transform your body into blazing indestructible fire.
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 81
